bubble.nodeName: the message bubble element inside content

error.description: Applied when the message has an error status

groupAuthorName.description: Class applied to the group author name element.

groupTimestamp.description: Class applied to the group timestamp element (compact variant only).

inlineMeta.nodeName: the inline meta container element (default variant)

inlineMetaSpacer.nodeName: the inline meta spacer element (default variant)

roleAssistant.description: Applied when the message role is 'assistant'

roleUser.description: Applied when the message role is 'user'

streaming.description: Applied while the message is streaming
